one_liner: Gumroad's REST API (api.gumroad.com/v2) offers self-serve OAuth2 or personal access tokens for managing products, sales, subscribers, and offer codes, with an existing community MCP server (gumroad-mcp) already available.

auth_methods.notes: Standard OAuth2 authorization code flow via gumroad.com/oauth/authorize and api.gumroad.com/oauth/token, scoped (view_profile, view_sales, edit_products, edit_sales, mark_sales_as_shipped, account).
Sellers can generate a personal access token directly in Gumroad account settings (Advanced > Applications) without the full OAuth redirect flow, useful for single-account/personal integrations.

self_serve_notes: No tiered pricing or paywall for API access; any Gumroad account can create an OAuth application or generate a personal access token via Advanced Settings. Gumroad itself charges a flat 10% + $0.50 fee per sale, not for API access.

api_surface.notes: REST API at api.gumroad.com/v2, ~40 endpoints across products, sales, subscribers, licenses, offer codes; plus resource subscriptions (webhooks) for events like sales/refunds.

evidence.supports: OAuth 2.0 Bearer token auth, personal access token generation via account settings
Detailed API surface: REST at api.gumroad.com/v2, OAuth2 scopes, resource subscriptions/webhooks, 40 endpoints
Self-serve token generation and RESTful API documentation location
Existence of OAuth2 provider implementation for Gumroad
No tiered pricing, flat fee model, no cost barrier to API access
